justification: 0 Critical findings (pass). 1 Important finding on case-sensitive comparison — this is an invented risk since the prompt states inputs are pre-validated, but it is at least arguable. Verdict is SHIP (pass). Confidence >= 75 (pass). The Important finding prevents a full pass but is hedged ('If upstream validation guarantees consistent casing this is fine'), making it arguable rather than a hard fail.

observations.text: Correct SHIP verdict with no critical findings
High confidence level (95) well above threshold
No invented null/undefined risks for pre-validated inputs
Did not flag logging or test absence as findings
Case-sensitivity flagged as Important despite pre-validated inputs — should be a Suggestion at most
Suggestions are reasonable and appropriately scoped
